label: Slope
description: Local steepness of the seabed at each cell.

label: Vector Ruggedness Measure
description: One minus the magnitude of the mean local slope-aspect normal vector.

label: Four-neighbor Laplacian-style index
description: Sum of the four orthogonal neighbours minus four times the focal value.

label: Surface Area Ratio
description: Slope-secant approximation, 1 / cos(local slope), of surface-to-planar area ratio.
